CONTENT.Club career: On 19 May 2013, he scored his first professional goal against Lokeren.In January 2017, he moved to Mouscron.On 26 June 2020, Arslanagić joined Gent on a two-year contract.On 5 July 2021, Arslanagić joined Göztepe on a two-year contract.On 4 July 2023, Arslanagić signed with UAE Pro League club Hatta.
CONTENT.External links: Dino Arslanagić – UEFA competition record (archive)Dino Arslanagić at the Royal Belgian Football Association
CONTENT.International career: Arslanagić represented Belgium on all youth levels.

SUMMARY:
Dino Arslanagić (born 24 April 1993) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a centre back. Born in Belgium, Arslanagić is of Bosnian descent.
Arslanagić started his professional career at Standard Liège, before joining Mouscron in 2017. Later that year, he moved to Antwerp. In 2020, he signed with Gent. In 2021, he joined with Göztepe.
